<script setup lang="ts">
import { h } from "vue";
import { DataTable, Button } from "elements";
import type { Column, Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const id = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${id}`);
    },
  },
  { id: "customer", label: "Customer", isSortable: true },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  { id: "items", label: "Items", isSortable: true },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const total = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(total);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";
import { defineProps } from "vue";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string | number;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'id' }"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { defineProps, h, computed } from "vue";
import { DataTable, type Column, Button } from "elements";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

// Status lookup maps
const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  completed: "Completed",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
} as const;

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  completed: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
} as const;

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const value = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${value}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status]
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => props.onView(row.original) },
        () => "View"
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original) },
        () => "Cancel"
      ),
    ],
  },
];
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable, Button } from "elements";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import { orders } from "./data";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      const label = statusLabels[status] || "Unknown";
      const css = statusClasses[status] || "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800";
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${css}`,
        },
        label,
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onView(row.original),
        },
        () => "View"
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original),
        },
        () => "Cancel"
      ),
    ],
  },
];
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true }"
  />
</template>

import { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono text-sm" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      const label = statusLabels[status] || "Unknown";
      const classes = statusClasses[status] || "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800";
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${classes}`,
        },
        label,
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = Number.parseFloat(row.getValue("total") as string);
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: () => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onView(order),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel(order),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
    props: (ctx: { row: any }) => {
       // Need to bind row to onClick in cell function context
       return (ctx: any) => [
            h(
              Button,
              {
                variant: "ghost",
                size: "sm",
                onClick: () => ctx.row.original,
              },
              () => "View",
            ),
            h(
              Button,
              {
                variant: "destructive",
                size: "sm",
                onClick: () => ctx.row.original,
              },
              () => "Cancel",
            ),
       ]
    }
  },
];

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  >
    <template #actions="{ row }">
      <Button
        variant="ghost"
        size="sm"
        @click="onView(row.original)"
      >
        View
      </Button>
      <Button
        variant="destructive"
        size="sm"
        @click="onCancel(row.original)"
      >
        Cancel
      </Button>
    </template>
  </DataTable>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable } from "elements";
import type { Column } from "elements";
import { Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";

import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

// Status lookup maps
const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  shipped: "Shipped",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  shipped: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800",
  delivered: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: false,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono text-sm" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      return h(
        "span",
        {
          class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${statusClasses[status]}`,
        },
        statusLabels[status],
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const count = row.getValue("items") as number;
      return h("span", null, count);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = row.getValue("total") as number;
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: () => [
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "ghost",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onView({} as Order),
        },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        {
          variant: "destructive",
          size: "sm",
          onClick: () => props.onCancel({} as Order),
        },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];

// Pass the props via a const to access inside the render function
// Note: In script setup defineProps is accessible via the props object or destructure
const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"

    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"

<script setup lang="ts">
import { DataTable, Column, Button } from "elements";
import { h } from "vue";
import { defineProps } from "vue";
import type { Order, OrderStatus } from "./types";
import { orders } from "./data";

const props = defineProps<{
  onView: (order: Order) => void;
  onCancel: (order: Order) => void;
}>();

// Status Lookup Maps
const statusLabels: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  processing: "Processing",
  completed: "Completed",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const statusClasses: Record<OrderStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800",
  processing: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800",
  completed: "bg-green-100 text-green-800",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-800",
};

const columns: Column<Order>[] = [
  {
    id: "id",
    label: "Order",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const orderId = row.getValue("id") as string;
      return h("span", { class: "font-mono text-sm" }, `#ORD-${orderId}`);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "customer",
    label: "Customer",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "status",
    label: "Status",
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const status = row.getValue("status") as OrderStatus;
      const label = statusLabels[status];
      const classes = statusClasses[status] || "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800";
      return h(
        "span",
        { class: `inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${classes}` },
        label || "Unknown",
      );
    },
  },
  {
    id: "items",
    label: "Items",
    isSortable: true,
  },
  {
    id: "total",
    label: "Total",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const amount = row.getValue("total") as number;
      const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
        style: "currency",
        currency: "USD",
      }).format(amount);
      return h("div", { class: "text-right font-medium" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "date",
    label: "Date",
    isSortable: true,
    cell: ({ row }) => {
      const rawDate = row.getValue("date") as string;
      const formatted = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {
        dateStyle: "medium",
      }).format(new Date(rawDate));
      return h("span", { class: "text-sm text-gray-600" }, formatted);
    },
  },
  {
    id: "actions",
    cell: ({ row }) => [
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "ghost", size: "sm", onClick: () => props.onView(row.original) },
        () => "View",
      ),
      h(
        Button,
        { variant: "destructive", size: "sm", onClick: () => props.onCancel(row.original) },
        () => "Cancel",
      ),
    ],
  },
];
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    :columns="columns"
    :data="orders"
    :config="{ filter: true, filterModel: 'customer' }"
  />
</template>
